vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #756

plan.title: fix(scripts/reconcile_issues.py): apply_lifecycle_fixes does not dedupe vBRIEFs that reference multiple closed issues (spurious file-missing failures, misleading exit 1)

narratives.Description: fix(scripts/reconcile_issues.py): apply_lifecycle_fixes does not dedupe vBRIEFs that reference multiple closed issues (spurious file-missing failures, misleading exit 1)
narratives.Problem: apply_lifecycle_fixes iterates per closed-issue Section (c) entry; when a single vBRIEF references multiple closed issues, the same file path appears N times. First move succeeds; subsequent attempts fail with 'vBRIEF file missing' because the file already moved. Exit 1 with N-1 spurious failures per multi-reference vBRIEF. No data loss; misleading exit code and inflated failures counter.
narratives.Acceptance: task reconcile:issues -- --apply-lifecycle-fixes on a tree with at least one multi-reference vBRIEF exits 0 with failures=0. Implementation per the issue's preferred form: pre-compute the unique candidate set before the move loop. New test test_apply_dedupes_multi_reference_vbrief in tests/cli/test_reconcile_issues_apply.py covering: synthetic report with one vBRIEF in three Section (c) entries; assert moved==1, failures==[], file landed in completed/ exactly once. Existing happy-path tests still pass unchanged.
narratives.OutOfScope: The inverted-lookup helper (#754/#755 -- correct). Reverse mismatches (issue reopened after vBRIEF reached completed/). The exit-code wrapping in tasks/reconcile.yml.

items.title: Pre-compute unique candidate set before the move loop in apply_lifecycle_fixes
Verify existing happy-path tests in tests/cli/test_reconcile_issues_apply.py continue passing

references.title: Issue #756: fix(scripts/reconcile_issues.py): apply_lifecycle_fixes does not dedupe vBRIEFs that reference multiple closed issues (spurious file-missing failures, misleading exit 1)

x-migrator.PhaseDescription: Urgent fixes to land ahead of broader roadmap work -- adoption blockers and bugs that block consumer adoption or successful first-session UX.
